known_renderer_limitations: prismarine-viewer renders from a browser view of the bot's world cache, not a native Minecraft Java F2 screenshot.
If the server/Mineflayer version is newer than the viewer texture set, unsupported or renamed blocks may appear as misleading colored boxes.
Camera angle, foliage, water, close geometry, and third-person clipping can make the image unsuitable for block identity review.

notes: Screenshots are review evidence from prismarine-viewer, not runtime verifier authority.
Visual evidence can differ from a real Minecraft Java client screenshot in lighting and renderer details.
Do not infer block identity from pixels alone; pair each image with observe/worldStateSummary/world-state-scan artifacts from the same or neighboring cycle.
This audit guarantees report capture completeness, not block identity correctness.
Block identity still comes from same-cycle runtime observations or world-state scans.
